content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach makes multiple specific, timely reads that change the conversation. Turn 12 names the rush-to-analysis explicitly ('I notice you've moved pretty quickly into analysis') — a read of the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body pattern that precedes the inquiry. Turn 14 catches a micro-shift in real time ('What got flat just now?') — a precise somatic/energetic read on the exact moment the performed quality leaked through, and it directly produces the client's first genuine drop in turn 15. Turn 8 also distinguishes thought from sensation, tracking the texture of each voice rather than their content. Reads consistently precede questions. The coach could have named the happiness filter / performed composure earlier (the smile-and-deflect pattern is visible from turn 7), but the turn-14 read effectively catches it when it matters. This is specific, AoA-flavored, and operative.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Content-level orienting question; no read yet."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Still gathering content."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots from content to somatic location — invites a body read rather than continuing the epistemological frame."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Distinguishes thought from sensation across the two voices — a textured read on the quality of each signal."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Offers an interpretation (both as protective) but doesn't name a visible read of how client is showing up; client deflects easily."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit, timely read: names the move into analysis and grounds the next question in it. Read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the flatness in the moment ('What got flat just now?') — precise energetic read that lands and produces the first real drop from the client."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter"],
  "notes": "The smile-and-polite-deflect pattern (turns 7, 11, 13) is the happiness filter in action; coach reads adjacent to it (flatness, analysis) but never names the filter itself."
}
